data.summary_suggestion: Remove a user account from the system
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a user account from the system by user ID. Requires API key authentication. This operation removes the user and may cascade to related data depending on system configuration. Returns a success confirmation. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague with no context about authentication, side effects, or return value. Enhanced version clarifies that deletion is permanent, requires authentication, explains potential cascading effects, and indicates the irreversible nature of the operation - critical information for AI agents to understand the severity and implications of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'listFolders' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too minimal. Added context about authentication requirement, what data is returned, and the domain purpose of folders to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all folders accessible to the authenticated user. Returns a list of folder objects containing folder metadata including ID, name, parent folder reference, and access level. Folders are typically used to organize and group password items.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Added context about authentication requirement, what data is returned, and the domain purpose of folders to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createFolder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and effects. Enhanced to clarify what parameters are needed (from FolderCreate schema context), what is returned, and the side effect of folder availability for item organization and sharing.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new folder for organizing items
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new folder in the password manager. Accepts folder creation parameters including name, parent folder ID, and access permissions. Returns the newly created folder object with assigned ID. The folder becomes immediately available for organizing password items and can be shared with other users based on specified permissions.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and effects. Enhanced to clarify what parameters are needed (from FolderCreate schema context), what is returned, and the side effect of folder availability for item organization and sharing.

message: Operation 'updateFolder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too vague for AI agent use. Added clarity on the folderId parameter requirement, what can be updated (from FolderUpdate schema), return value, partial update support, and the side effect of permission changes affecting shared access.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing folder identified by folderId. Accepts folder update parameters including name and access permissions. Returns the updated folder object. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified. Changes to folder permissions affect access for all users with shared access to this folder.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague for AI agent use. Added clarity on the folderId parameter requirement, what can be updated (from FolderUpdate schema), return value, partial update support, and the side effect of permission changes affecting shared access.

message: Operation 'deleteFolder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Original description lacks critical information about cascading effects and permissions. Enhanced to clarify the folderId requirement, the permanent nature of deletion, cascade behavior with contained items, and the impact on shared access for other users.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete a folder and its contents
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a folder identified by folderId. Requires the folderId path parameter. Deletion is permanent and typically cascades to remove or reassign all password items contained within the folder. Returns a success confirmation. This operation requires appropriate permissions and may affect other users if the folder was shared.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical information about cascading effects and permissions. Enhanced to clarify the folderId requirement, the permanent nature of deletion, cascade behavior with contained items, and the impact on shared access for other users.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new system user account
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new user account in the Teampass system. Accepts user creation parameters including username, email, password, role, and status from the UserCreate schema. The new user account becomes immediately active and can be assigned to folders and access password items based on their role and permissions.

data.summary_suggestion: Authenticate user and obtain API key
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with provided credentials and returns an API key for subsequent authenticated requests. Accepts username and password in the request body. Returns an API key that must be included in the 'Authorization' header for all subsequent API calls. The returned key remains valid until revoked or expired.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks critical details. Improved version clarifies authentication mechanism, specifies expected inputs (credentials), explains the returned API key's purpose and usage, and mentions key lifecycle. data.summary_suggestion: Delete a folder and its contents

This operation requires appropriate permissions and may affect other users if the folder was shared.
